log_entries.thought_preview: The sample is a UPX compressed PE32 executable, likely a spreader. Get information about the types of IOCs (Indicators of Compromise) available in the report.
There are no network IOCs, but there is a single registry persistence key. Investigate the registry changes to understand the persistence mechanism.
The persistence key is set to a specific executable in the Temp folder. Investigate the dropped files to see if this executable is one of them.
There are no dropped files. This is unexpected, given the persistence key was set to a specific executable. Investigate the process activity to see if the executable was spawned by the malware.

The notable modules loaded by the processes are system libraries, which doesn't provide much insight into the malware's behavior. Investigate the network activity to see if the malware communicated wi
There is no network activity, which suggests that the malware may be a local-only threat. Investigate the CAPA behaviors to see if they provide any insight into the malware's behavior.
